# Buisson

*Damp moss, warm parchment, and the kind of light that makes you want to stay.*

[Palette](#palette) · [Ports](#ports) · [Contributing](#contributing)

</div>

<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/buisson-theme/Buisson/main/assets/separator.png" width="100%" alt="" />

<div align="center">

## Palette

<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/buisson-theme/Buisson/main/assets/org-palette.png" alt="Buisson palette" />

6 botanical accents: hibiscus · sage · river-moss · slate-sky · thistle · ochre

Each color pair calibrated against WCAG 2.1. Main text at 11.55:1 AAA.

</div>

## Contributing

New ports are always welcome — every stone placed makes the path easier to find.
Open an issue or a PR to add your rock to the cairn.
